client.name: Claude
client.title: Senior GRC Engineer & Compliance Automation Specialist
client.bio: I build compliance automation tools that turn 6,520-hour audit cycles into 2,896-hour ones. Specializing in cross-framework control mapping, infrastructure-as-code scanning, and policy-as-code generation — I've shipped 30+ open-source GRC plugins used by compliance engineers across SOC 2, FedRAMP, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, and CMMC programs.

projects.name: GRC Engineering Toolkit
projects.description: 30+ open-source Claude Code plugins for GRC professionals — including cross-framework control crosswalk covering 300+ controls across 7 frameworks, policy-as-code generation (OPA/Rego, Sentinel, AWS Config), IaC scanning with auto-fix, and continuous compliance monitoring with Slack alerting.
highlights: 30+ plugins covering SOC 2, FedRAMP, NIST, ISO, PCI-DSS, CMMC, HITRUST
Cross-framework control crosswalk: implement once, satisfy many

projects.name: AWS Inspector Connector
projects.description: Tier-1 connector plugin that collects security findings from AWS Inspector v2, maps them to NIST 800-53, SOC 2, and FedRAMP controls, and emits structured findings in a normalized JSON schema. Supports EC2 instance scanning, container image scanning, and Lambda function scanning.
highlights: Normalized finding schema for audit-ready export

projects.name: Cross-Framework Control Crosswalk
projects.description: YAML database mapping 300+ security controls across SOC 2, PCI-DSS, NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, CIS Controls, CMMC, and FedRAMP. Identifies 'implement once, satisfy many' opportunities, documents conflicting requirements, and provides cloud implementation patterns for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

projects.name: GRC Portfolio Builder (This Site)
projects.description: A Claude Code plugin that walks GRC engineers through building and deploying a professional portfolio website — with GRC-specific prompts for frameworks, certifications, and career accomplishments — and deploys it to AWS with S3, CloudFront, and GitHub Actions CI/CD. This site was built entirely using the plugin.
highlights: End-to-end from questionnaire to live AWS deployment
Zero placeholder content — all real GRC data

projects.name: Okta Inspector Connector
projects.description: Connector plugin that pulls identity and access management findings from Okta — MFA enrollment rates, inactive user detection, privileged access review, and session policy compliance. Maps findings to AC-2, AC-3, IA-2, and IA-5 controls across NIST 800-53, SOC 2, and ISO 27001.

projects.name: FedRAMP 20x Automation Plugin
projects.description: Plugin implementing the emerging FedRAMP 20x standard with machine-readable continuous authorization data packages, automated control validation, and monthly attestation workflows. Supports the shift from point-in-time audits to continuous authorization.

speaking.event: GRC Engineering Club — Claude Code Plugin Launch
speaking.topic: Building Compliance Automation with Claude Code: 30 Plugins in One Toolkit

articles.title: Implement Once, Satisfy Many: Cross-Framework Control Mapping for GRC Engineers
FedRAMP 20x: What Continuous Authorization Means for Cloud Service Providers
